name: react-resilience-lab-workspace
description: Production-minded React patterns for unreliable APIs and recoverable client state

scripts.build: pnpm build:contracts && pnpm --filter @react-resilience/fault-api build && pnpm --filter @react-resilience/web build
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm build:contracts && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
